author: Yazan Ammar
description: Customize Obsidian without touching CSS. Create profiles with colors, snippets, backgrounds, and themes - all managed from one place. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Yazan Ammar
manifest.description: Take full control of your workspace with dynamic theme profiles, live overrides, and a powerful customization engine built for complete visual freedom.
manifest.name: Theme Engine

name: Theme Engine

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release focuses on deeper integration with Obsidian’s native APIs, expanded variable coverage, and internal architectural improvements for stability and long-term maintainability.

## Added

* Expanded color variable coverage across navigation, links, editor, tables, canvas, tabs, and scrollbar states.
* Expanded support for additional official callout color variables.
* Trademark and visual identity documentation (`TRADEMARK.md`).

## Changed

* Localization now automatically follows Obsidian's active language using native APIs (`getLanguage()`).
* Background media storage moved into the plugin's local directory structure.
* Build pipeline migrated to a dedicated `esbuild.config.mjs` setup.
* Profile navigation and theme cycle commands now use `checkCallback` for improved command palette behavior.
* Replaced custom debounce implementations with Obsidian's native utilities where applicable.
* Simplified CSS scoping and reduced unnecessary core UI overrides.

## Fixed

* Improved interval cleanup and reduced unnecessary background processing.
* Fixed CSS leakage that could unintentionally affect parts of the Obsidian interface.
* Improved Arabic and Persian translation formatting and consistency.

## Removed

* Removed unsafe `HTMLElement.prototype.setCssProps` monkey-patching.
* Removed deprecated migration logic and legacy system file modification behavior.
* Removed manual language state handling in favor of host application settings.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v210---2026-05-14)

## Manual Installation

1. Download the `obsidian-theme-engine.zip` file below.
    
2. Extract the contents (`main.js`, `styles.css`, `manifest.json`) directly into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-theme-engine/`.
    
3. Enable **Theme Engine** in Community Plugins settings.
    

> Starting from `v2.1.0`, release archives no longer include an enclosing `obsidian-theme-engine/` folder.
>
> The plugin files are now placed directly at the root of the `.zip` archive.
releases.name: v2.1.0 - The Native Integration Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release rebrands the plugin to Theme Engine and introduces automatic migration for existing users.

## Breaking Changes

- Plugin manifest ID changed from color-master to theme-engine
- Command namespace updated to theme-engine:*

## Added

- Automatic migration of settings and hotkeys
- Migration support for legacy plugin IDs
- Empty-results search indicator

## Changed

- Updated plugin identity and UI branding
- Improved search and profile manager interface
- Refined CSS snippet interaction and redesigned Support card
- Improved light-mode button visibility

## Compatibility

- Automatic migration for existing users
- No manual steps required


> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v200---2026-02-14-the-theme-engine-rebrand)

## Manual Installation

1. Download the `obsidian-theme-engine.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Theme Engine** in Community Plugins settings.
releases.name: v2.0.0 - The Theme Engine Rebrand

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces a rewritten color engine, a redesigned translation system, and improved UI state management.

## Added

- Dynamic theme capture system.
- Transparent background behavior for the "Default" profile.
- Custom language support with a tree-view translation editor (includes search and RTL support).
- Translation management tools (import, export, copy, paste as JSON).
- Advanced notice keyword highlighting mode.
- Granular selective data reset controls.
- Snippet locking to prevent accidental reordering.

## Changed

- Unified HEX/HEXA color normalization for cross-app consistency.
- Improved UI state feedback (Pristine/Modified) logic.
- Graph View updates now apply instantly without requiring a reload.
- Render loop optimized for smoother interaction.
- Refined snapshot baseline logic.

## Fixed

- 8-digit HEX transparency rendering issue.

## Removed

- Legacy "Cyberpunk" and "Solarized Nebula" profiles.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v120---2025-11-29-the-theme-engine-update)

## Manual Installation

1. Download the `obsidian-theme-engine.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Theme Engine** in Community Plugins settings.
releases.name: v1.2.0 - The Theme Engine & Polyglot Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces support for video backgrounds, dynamic custom variable types, and state preservation in settings.

## Added
- Support for `.mp4` and `.webm` video backgrounds with opacity and mute controls.
- Convert-to-JPG option to optimize uploaded PNG, WEBP, and BMP images.
- Interactive video previews and active background highlighting in the media browser.
- Support for multiple custom variable types (Color, Size, Text, Number) with context-aware input controls.
- Validation logic to prevent duplicate custom variable creation.
- Search and highlighting support for custom variable names and descriptions.

## Changed
- Redesigned background settings modal with Image/Video media type separation.
- Settings tab now restores the last search query and scroll position during an active session.
- Reset process now preserves installation date, language preference, and layout direction (RTL/LTR).

## Fixed
- Resolved background switching flicker during transitions.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v111---2025-11-01)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-theme-engine.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Theme Engine** in Community Plugins settings.
releases.name: v1.1.1 - Add Video Backgrounds

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces support for per-profile custom background images and a centralized media management system.

## Added
- Support for assigning and toggling unique background images per profile.
- Global background storage (`.obsidian/backgrounds`) accessible across all profiles.
- Multiple background input methods (file upload, URL, paste, drag-and-drop).
- Background media browser with image preview, renaming (locked extension), and deletion support.
- Automatic transparency handling for core UI variables when a background is active.

## Fixed
- Resolved an `EBUSY` error that blocked the plugin reset process.

## Removed
- Default snippets from the "OLED Matrix" profile.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v110---2025-10-25)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.1.0 - The Custom Backgrounds Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces profile importing capabilities from installed themes and snippets, along with new theme cycle controls.

## Added
- Support for importing profiles directly from installed Obsidian Themes and CSS Snippets.
- Theme management controls (Light/Dark/Auto) via a new quick toggle button in the Profile Manager and a dedicated cycle command.
- "Reset Plugin to Factory Defaults" feature.

## Changed
- Redesigned the Advanced Settings section with a card-based UI layout.

## Fixed
- Resolved a rendering issue with multi-word tags (e.g., `#tag_with_words`).
- Resolved a potential XSS security vulnerability to enhance plugin safety.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v109---2025-10-17)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.9 - Smarter Theme Control

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces global CSS snippets, new workspace commands, and a dedicated snippet creation workflow.

## Added
- Global CSS Snippets that apply across all profiles, featuring a save toggle and a visual badge indicator.
- Workspace commands to cycle to the previous profile and directly open the plugin settings.
- Ribbon icon for quick workspace access to the settings panel.
- RTL layout toggle for Right-to-Left language users.

## Changed
- Snippet creation separated into a dedicated "Create New Snippet" workflow, limiting the `Import / Paste (.css)` action to CSS-based profiles only.
- Iconize integration settings relocated to a dedicated modal.
- Settings interface visually redesigned, including replacing the search bar clear button with a brush icon.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v108---2025-09-22)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.8 - The Global Snippets Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces custom CSS variables, enhanced CSS editor capabilities, and expanded localization support.

## Added
- Custom CSS variable creation support.
- Drag-and-drop reordering and session-persistent Undo/Redo history for CSS snippet editors.
- Full UI translations for French and Persian.

## Changed
- Notice rules are now case-insensitive.
- "Create New Snippet" button repositioned for faster access.
- Custom variables are now included in the plugin's statistics count.

## Fixed
- Resolved an issue where notice rules failed to match non-Latin keywords due to incorrect RegEx handling.
- Fixed RTL layout inconsistencies and improved rendering in mixed LTR/RTL interface environments.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v107---2025-09-19)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.7 - The TypeScript Rewrite & Feature Overhaul

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces a prioritized notice coloring system, additional Markdown variables, and foundational RTL language support.

## Added
- Advanced Notice Coloring system with prioritized keyword/RegEx rules, profile-specific export/import support, and a dedicated "Test Rule" preview button.
- Additional Markdown color variables for blockquotes (`--blockquote-bg`), horizontal rules (`--hr-color`), code blocks, and text highlights.
- Foundational Right-to-Left (RTL) layout support with full Arabic translation.

## Changed
- Search system expanded to filter by variable descriptions and visually highlight matched terms.
- Redesigned multiple UI modals, including a new tag-based keyword input for the notice rule creation interface.

## Fixed
- Resolved an issue where notice rules failed to match non-Latin keywords due to incorrect RegEx handling.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v106---2025-09-13)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.6  - The Thematic Intelligence Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces a standalone CSS Snippets system, full editing support for CSS-based profiles, and expanded tag styling controls.

## Added
- CSS Snippets system for creating lightweight, reusable customizations with independent toggle, edit, and copy support.
- Full editing support for CSS-based profiles, including renaming and modifying raw CSS code.
- Restore functionality to revert built-in profiles to their original state, including automatic recovery for deleted default profiles.
- Dedicated tag styling variables (`--tag-color`, `--tag-color-hover`, `--tag-bg`).
- Expanded contrast checker coverage for tags, icons, and interactive UI elements.
- "Create New" option in the JSON import modal to directly generate a new profile from imported data.
- Eraser button in color pickers to instantly set values to `transparent`.

## Changed
- "Paste CSS" action renamed to "Paste / Import (CSS)..." for improved clarity.

## Fixed
- CSS Profile snapshot system now correctly saves and restores both color variables and raw CSS code, and no longer loses data during profile renaming.
- Resolved an issue where updating a CSS profile triggered duplicate notifications.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v105---2025-09-08)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.5 - The Snippet & Polish Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces support for pasting raw CSS profiles, a multi-step color undo system, and a more focused search experience.

## Added
- Support for creating CSS-based profiles directly by pasting raw CSS code.
- Multi-step color undo system capable of storing up to five previous values per color variable.

## Changed
- Redesigned the search experience by repositioning the search bar to the top, hiding unrelated UI sections during search, and refining filtering logic to prevent empty category headers.
- Visually redesigned the support section, including the addition of a dedicated button linking to the developer's GitHub profile.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v104---2025-09-04)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.4 - The CSS Freedom Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces a profile snapshot system, advanced search filtering, and improved Graph View editing controls.

## Added
- Profile Snapshots system featuring Pin and Reset to Pinned functionality.
- Advanced search bar in the Profile Manager with support for filtering by name/value, case sensitivity, and Regular Expressions (RegEx).
- Workspace commands to toggle the plugin state and cycle to the next profile.
- Live Update FPS slider (0–60 FPS) to control preview rendering performance.
- Enhanced Import modal with Merge and Replace modes, alongside a new Copy JSON action for profiles.
- Redesigned support section featuring live usage statistics.

## Changed
- Graph View editing now utilizes a temporary state system, automatically canceling unsaved changes if the settings window is closed.
- Profile action UI redesigned and repositioned for improved accessibility and clarity.

## Fixed
- Resolved an issue where Iconize colors did not update live while dragging the color picker.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v103---2025-09-03)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.3 - The Power User Update

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces automated Obsidian theme switching, instant Graph View refreshing, and robust Iconize integration cleanup.

## Added
- Per-profile theme classification (Light, Dark, Automatic) paired with automatic Obsidian theme switching upon profile activation.
- Instant workspace-wide refresh for Graph View color changes, along with a permanent Refresh button in the Graph View section.
- Automated cleanup system with a configurable interval setting to remove orphaned icons when the `Iconize` plugin is uninstalled.
- Support section in settings displaying usage statistics and repository links.

## Changed
- Iconize color overrides now utilize a `MutationObserver` to ensure consistent re-application during UI updates.

## Fixed
- Resolved an issue where Graph View color updates were not applying to already opened Graph View tabs.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v102---2025-08-30)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.2 - The Instant Refresh & Smart Themes Update!

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This release introduces full integration with the Iconize plugin.

## Added
- Integration with the Iconize plugin, introducing the ability to override default icon colors directly from the plugin settings.

## Changed
- Relocated the "Override Iconize Colors" setting under the Profile Manager section for improved accessibility.

## Fixed
- Resolved an issue where Iconize color overrides persisted even after disabling the main plugin toggle.

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v101---2025-08-28)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.1 - The Iconize Integration

releases.author: YazanAmmar
releases.description:
This is the initial public release of Color Master.

## Added
- Live UI editor for core Obsidian CSS color variables with instant preview.
- Profile management system with support to create, delete, and switch between profiles.
- Import and export support for profiles using `.json` files.
- Bilingual user interface (English and Arabic) with full Right-to-Left (RTL) layout support.
- Bundled default profiles:
  - Default
  - OLED Matrix
  - Solarized Nebula
  - Cyberpunk Sunset
  - Citrus Zest

> **Full Changelog:** See detailed history in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YazanAmmar/obsidian-theme-engine/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v100---2025-08-22)

## Manual Installation
1. Download the `obsidian-color-master.zip` file below.
2. Extract it into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Enable **Color Master** in Community Plugins settings in Obsidian.
releases.name: v1.0.0 - Initial Release
